prestazioni: Engine: XU9J4 (2.1L I4, 16V, turbocharged) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Turbocharger upgraded to a Garrett GT4202R with a 76mm compressor wheel and 84mm turbine, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by SMS Engineering (Pikes Peak-spec).

Fuel System: Dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps feeding 1,200cc ID1700X injectors, controlled by a Motec M150 ECU with Pikes Peak-specific traction control and launch control maps. Custom water-methanol injection system by Snow Performance (Stage 3) with a 5-gallon tank mounted in the rear cargo area.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Reinforced Peugeot 405 T16 transaxle with a Quaife ATB differential and a custom 5-speed sequential gearbox by Hewland (FT200). Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (Pikes Peak-tuned valving) and spherical bearing top mounts. Brembo GT 8.4-inch front brake calipers with 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors (Pagid RS14 pads) and AP Racing CP8300 rear calipers with 355mm rotors.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber body kit by APR Performance (Pikes Peak-spec), including a massive 2.2-meter rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps, front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny. Lightweight carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts for intercooler and brake cooling.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Safety Devices (8-point, chromoly steel) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 6-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II) and a custom carbon fiber dashboard housing a Motec C127 digital dash and AIM MXL2 data logger.

Exterior: Custom livery by Driftworks featuring the iconic Peugeot Sport Pikes Peak color scheme (white, blue, and red) with sponsor decals (Total, Michelin, and Sparco). Lightweight 18-inch OZ Racing Superleggera wheels (9x18 front, 11x18 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/18 front, 335/30/18 rear).
